01 /

What I Do
for You

📊
01
Campaign Optimization & Analysis
Deep-dive into your traffic data. I audit campaigns, identify what's bleeding budget, and provide actionable recommendations to improve ROI, CVR, and EPC. You get a clear picture of where every dollar goes.
ROI Analysis CVR Optimization EPC Boost
🔗
02
SmartLink Setup & CrossTracking
Full SmartLink architecture on AdsBridge with cross-platform tracking between multiple systems. Static/dynamic ID exchange, postback configuration, payout setup — done right. Ideal for small teams and solo affiliates.
AdsBridge Postbacks CrossTracking
🤝
03
BDM Consulting & Partner Relations
I know what advertisers and affiliate networks need to say YES. I'll help your media buy team define traffic terms, communicate conditions, and build profitable long-term partnerships. Inside knowledge of both sides.
Partnership Terms Network Relations Traffic Conditions
🎯
04
Paid Traffic Strategy & Scaling
Data-backed scaling plans for what's working. I analyze winning combinations, identify scaling levers, and build a step-by-step plan to grow volume without destroying performance.
Scaling Strategy Budget Planning A/B Testing
📈
05
Performance Audit for Businesses
For businesses running paid ads: I audit your current campaigns with the same rigor I'd apply to affiliate traffic. Google, Meta, push, native — I evaluate quality of spend and show you where to improve.
Google Ads Meta Ads Funnel Audit
🔬
06
Market & Offer Research
Research on verticals, offers, GEOs, and competition. I identify which affiliate offers have the best conditions and traffic potential, and which niches are worth entering — based on real data, not hunches.
GEO Research Offer Analysis Competitor Intel

How We Can
Work Together

One-Time
Campaign Audit
Fixed Price · From $300
  • Full analysis of your current campaigns
  • ROI / CVR / EPC breakdown
  • Written report with action points
  • 1 follow-up call included
  • Delivery in 3–5 business days
Most Popular
Ongoing Optimization
Monthly Retainer · From $800/mo
  • Weekly campaign performance reviews
  • Optimization recommendations
  • Scaling strategy & budget guidance
  • Partner/network communication support
  • Priority Telegram/Slack access
  • Monthly summary report
Technical
SmartLink Setup
Fixed Price · From $1400
  • Full SmartLink build on AdsBridge
  • Cross-platform tracking setup
  • Postback & pixel configuration
  • Static + dynamic ID exchange
  • Documentation & handover
05 /

How It
Works

Step 01
Discovery Call
We talk about your situation, goals, current metrics, and what you actually need. 30 minutes. No commitment.
Step 02
Data Access
You share tracker access or export. I dig into the real numbers — not assumptions. Everything stays confidential.
Step 03
Analysis & Plan
I deliver findings and a prioritized action plan. Clear, specific, implementable. Not generic advice.
Step 04
Execute & Scale
We implement changes, monitor performance, and scale what works. Ongoing support available.
06 /

Let's
Talk

Whether you need a campaign audit, tracking setup, or ongoing optimization support — I'm ready to dig into the data and help you grow.
